shared_properties: Pickup footprint remains 8x16 px with a centered handle and a flame that never exceeds the authored height.
Core palette metadata remains primary #3B3347, background #0D0D0F, and accent #E07B39 while flame and wood colors stay inside specs.colors_hex.
Torch silhouette stays legible against both dark stone walls and the bright HP UI strip.
differences: Four frames animate the flame tip through a 2 px lateral sway and a 1 px height variation.
Amber flame colors dominate the top half while the handle stays a thin 2 px brown shaft in the lower half.
The pickup reads as beneficial rather than dangerous through warm colors and a compact non-spiked silhouette.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the 8x16 healing torch size, pickup behavior, and maximum HP restoration role inside the dungeon run.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the warm amber contrast against the dark shaft so healing pickups remain visible but rare.

reference_images.label: player_concept
reference_images.purpose: Grounds player-to-item scale so the prisoner body clearly reads as larger than the healing pickup.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteBundle for static hazards or SpriteSheetBundle for animated hazards, all rendered with nearest-neighbor sampling.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load hazard textures and atlases during the shared Loading state and expose handles through HazardVisualRegistry keyed by asset_key.
runtime_notes: Keep collision volumes in gameplay components rather than inferring them from visual pixels.
Align every hazard origin to the 16x16 grid unless the authored size is 24x24 or 48x16 by design.
Use visibility toggles or atlas index changes instead of runtime texture swaps to avoid hitching during repeated descent loops.

context.usage: Optional healing item placed rarely in the shaft when HP recovery is allowed.

flame_notes: Flame occupies y0-y6 and handle occupies y7-y15.
Bright amber pixels cover at least 6 pixels in every frame.
Handle width stays exactly 2 px through all frames.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 32x16 px with 4 frames of 8x16 px and 0 px spacing.
Flame animation cycles at 8 fps and the handle remains a stable 2 px vertical shaft in all frames.
Only the listed warm colors plus transparency are used and the pickup remains readable on a #0D0D0F background.
